narrative_beat: Wide split Joao versus editor moderno conectados por fogo dourado

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a split composition: left half shows the apostle John writing in his cave (warm tones), right half shows an anonymous Victorian editor writing at a desk (warm tones), both connected by a diagonal line of golden fire crossing the center of the frame
subject.focal_point: the golden fire line connecting the two writers at center
subject.secondary: Both figures in rich warm tones. Background behind each in monochrome.
props: apostle John in cave on left
Victorian editor at desk on right
diagonal golden fire line connecting them

environment.location: split scene: Patmos cave left / Victorian office right

composition.foreground: both writers in rich warm tones connected by gold fire
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white environments behind each writer

lighting.key_light: candle on each side illuminating respective writer
lighting.fill_light: golden glow from fire line at center

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: chronological mirror, the same message across millennia

symbolism.primary: two writers, 2000 years apart, describing the same event
symbolism.secondary: fire as the thread of prophecy connecting eras

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only
anonymous figure without recognizable facial features
silhouette or contre-jour lighting hiding identity

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
